text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hey, have you heard? Apparently,<n>someone out
there's invented a ramen<n>vending machine!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
With just a push of a button, it'll make a<n>fresh,
hot bowl of ramen for you<n>anytime!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I wonder if we could get some installed<n>back in
Ireland? If we had an easy way<n>to connect with
other cultures, I think<n>more people would show an
interest in<n>Japan.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Ramen... will be a bridge between<n>nations.
Mm-hm. ♪ Doesn't that just<n>sound lovely?
